# Public mirror allowlist patterns (glob)
#
# Files in the public mirror must match at least one of these patterns.
# Treat this as a strict publication boundary.

# Repository metadata and policy
README.md
LICENSE
CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
CONTRIBUTING.md
CHANGELOG.md
.env.example
AGENTS.md
mkdocs.yml
.gitignore
.gitleaks.toml
.pre-commit-config.yaml
.gitguardian.yml
.gitguardian.yaml
.hadolint.yaml

# GitHub workflows and templates
.github/workflows/*.yml
.github/workflows/*.yaml
.github/public-mirror-*.txt
.github/publication-gates.md

# Documentation (internal docs excluded by denylist)
docs/**

# Core code and platform modules
cli/**
libs/**
sdk/**
tests/**
inference/**
ray_compute/**
mlflow-server/**
fusionauth/**
oauth2-proxy/**
config/**
scripts/**
monitoring/**
pipelines/**
postgres/**
chat-ui-v2/**
sba-resource-portal/**

# Compose and service definitions
deploy/compose/docker-compose*.yml
*.service
run_tests.sh
start_all_safe.sh
stop_all.sh
stop_dev.sh
start_all_dev.sh
check_platform_status.sh
